title: My 11 Best Dividend Kings For October 2022
text: The 45 Dividend Kings finished September with the worst loss this year, collectively losing 8.34%. Last month, the 11 best dividend kings based on forecasted growth and valuation underperformed the average dividend king return by 5 bps.
